# seokit

Two Playwright expect matchers for SEO checks — toHaveMetadata and toHaveJsonLd

## When to use

- Asserting page metadata (title, description, canonical, hreflang, robots)
- Asserting JSON-LD structured data in Playwright specs

## Instructions

1. Install: `npm install @sargonpiraev/seokit @playwright/test`
2. Read [Overview](https://sargonpiraev.github.io/seokit/docs) then [Getting started](https://sargonpiraev.github.io/seokit/docs/getting-started)
3. Shared `src/test/seokit.ts` with `extendSeokitExpect`
4. Assert with `toHaveMetadata` and `toHaveJsonLd`
5. Reference: [Matchers](https://sargonpiraev.github.io/seokit/docs/matchers)
6. For HTTP status/headers use Playwright (`response?.ok()`, `response?.status()`)
7. Import `test`/`expect` only from the local seokit test module
